tagged_types.name: Instance
tagged_types.code:
type Instance is tagged limited private
  with Iterable => (First       => First_Cursor,
                    Next        => Advance,
                    Has_Element => Cursor_Has_Element,
                    Element     => Get_Element);

subprograms.name: Advance
subprograms.code: function Advance (This : Instance; Position : Cursor) return Cursor

subprograms.name: Create
Create_From_Array
Cursor_Has_Element
subprograms.code:
function Cursor_Has_Element (This : Instance; Position : Cursor)
                             return Boolean

subprograms.name: Get_Element
subprograms.code:
function Get_Element (This : Instance; Position : Cursor)
                      return Storage_Element
